title: SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER - 211info
text: MONROE HEALTH CENTER MONROE GRADE SCHOOL SBHC SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Services include routine physical exams and sports physicals, treatment of illness and injury, vision and hearing screenings, dental screenings, blood pressure screenings, immunizations, mental health services, age-appropriate reproductive health, routine lab tests, prescription medication maintenance, and health, fitness, and nutrition education and promotion. 610 Dragon Drive Monroe, OR 97456 Eligibility: Varies, call for information Some SBHC are for students and staff only, others are for all children 0-19 in the school district, and others are open to the general public. Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-noon, and 1pm-6pm Email (541) 766-6000 .. Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 766-6000 Main phone Main phone (541) 766-6000 Jennifer Reid [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Accepts OHP, some private insurances and sliding scale fees available. Students will not be turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information for those applying for sliding scale fees. AREA SERVED: Benton, Lane, and Linn Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on the Monroe Grade School (K-8) campus Services: Childhood Immunization Dental Hygiene Dental Screening Mental Health Evaluation * Grade School Students Oral Health Education/Information Sports Participation Physical Examinations Student Health Programs Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - PRIMARY HEALTH CARE SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MONROE HEALTH CENTER MONROE GRADE SCHOOL SBHC
